verseText: All authority has been given to me in heaven and on earth. Go and make disciples of all nations… and behold, I am with you always, even to the end of the age.
prayerModel: All authority is Yours, Lord, so I go on Your command, not my own confidence — and I lean on Your promise that You're with me right now in this conversation.

verseText: But you will receive power when the Holy Spirit has come upon you. You will be witnesses to me in Jerusalem… and to the uttermost parts of the earth.
prayerModel: Father, fill me with Your Spirit and His power; make me Your witness right where You've placed me, and stretch my heart toward the lost near and far.

verseText: Pray for me, that utterance may be given to me in opening my mouth, to make known with boldness the mystery of the Good News…
prayerModel: When I open my mouth, give me the words and the boldness to make the gospel clear. I'm Your ambassador — let me speak as I ought, unafraid of the reception.

verseText: Grant to your servants to speak your word with all boldness… they were all filled with the Holy Spirit, and they spoke the word of God with boldness.
prayerModel: You see every pressure that tempts me to stay silent. As You answered Your church of old, grant me boldness and fill me afresh with Your Spirit.

verseText: For I am not ashamed of the Good News of Christ, because it is the power of God for salvation for everyone who believes…
prayerModel: Take away every trace of shame — the gospel is Your power, not mine. Help me trust that the message itself saves, so I can simply be faithful.

verseText: …praying… that God may open to us a door for the word, to speak the mystery of Christ… that I may reveal it as I ought to speak.
prayerModel: Open a door for Your word today and make me alert when it comes. Give me clarity to reveal Christ plainly, just as I ought.

verseText: Walk in wisdom toward those who are outside… Let your speech always be with grace, seasoned with salt, that you may know how you ought to answer each one.
prayerModel: Help me walk in wisdom toward those who don't yet know You. Season my speech with grace and salt so I know how to answer each person in front of me.

verseText: …pray for us, that the word of the Lord may spread rapidly and be glorified…
prayerModel: Let Your word speed ahead and be honored through my life and my church — run swiftly through this city and this generation.

verseText: The harvest indeed is plentiful, but the laborers are few. Pray therefore that the Lord of the harvest will send out laborers into his harvest.
prayerModel: Lord of the harvest, the field is plentiful but the workers few — send out laborers, and as I pray it, make me one of them.

verseText: …God our Savior, who desires all people to be saved and come to full knowledge of the truth.
prayerModel: You desire all people to be saved, so I lift up the lost by name — let praying for them be the first work I do, knowing it pleases You.

theme: Spiritual warfare & dependence on the Spirit
verseText: 'Not by might, nor by power, but by my Spirit,' says Yahweh of Armies.
prayerModel: No salvation comes by my might or power, but only by Your Spirit. Empty me of self-reliance and clever arguments, and do what I never could.

theme: Spiritual warfare & dependence on the Spirit
verseText: …the god of this world has blinded the minds of the unbelieving… It is God who said, 'Light will shine out of darkness,' who has shone in our hearts…
prayerModel: The enemy has blinded the minds of those I speak with — this is Your battle. You who commanded light out of darkness, shine the gospel into their hearts today.

theme: Spiritual warfare & dependence on the Spirit
verseText: How will they hear without a preacher?… So faith comes by hearing, and hearing by the word of God.
prayerModel: They can't believe in One they've never heard, and faith comes by hearing Your word — so send me. Make my feet beautiful with good news today.

verseText: …Always be ready to give an answer to everyone who asks you a reason concerning the hope that is in you, with humility and fear.
prayerModel: Take the throne of my heart so You, not my pride, lead this conversation. Make me ready to give a reason for my hope — with gentleness and respect, never harshness.

verseText: The Lord's servant must not quarrel, but be gentle toward all… in gentleness correcting those who oppose him.
prayerModel: Keep me from quarreling; make me kind, patient, and gentle even with those who oppose the truth. You alone grant repentance — free them from the enemy's snare.

verseText: No one can come to me unless the Father who sent me draws him…
prayerModel: No one comes to Jesus unless You draw them — so draw this person to Yourself with cords of love, and I'll trust the outcome to You.

verseText: …to open their eyes, that they may turn from darkness to light and from the power of Satan to God…
prayerModel: Open blind eyes; turn this soul from darkness to light, from Satan's power to God. Grant them forgiveness and a place among Your people.

verseText: I will give you a new heart… I will take away the stony heart out of your flesh, and I will give you a heart of flesh.
prayerModel: Only You can replace a heart of stone with a heart of flesh — do that miracle in this person and make them alive to You.

verseText: …so is my word that goes out of my mouth: it will not return to me void, but it will accomplish that which I please…
prayerModel: Your word never returns empty. As I share the Scriptures today, I trust them to do the work You sent them to do, even when I see no fruit.

verseText: Those who sow in tears will reap in joy… will certainly come again with joy, carrying his sheaves.
prayerModel: Give me a heart that sows even through tears and rejection. Help me keep scattering the seed, trusting I'll one day return with songs of joy.
